name: llm-wiki
description: llm-wiki monorepo: Skill core, workbench, and shared packages.

scripts.check:route-registry: npm run build -w @llm-wiki/workbench-contracts && npm run build -w @llm-wiki/graph-engine && node --import tsx --test workbench/server/test/route-registry-parity.test.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run check:boundaries && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
